Off Calendar May-19-2021 Continued To Oct-05-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Compliance With Demand For Physical Examinationand Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MICHAEL J. DALEY, Esq. of Philip M. Andersen & Associates (Tel: 925-225-6838) for Defendant Elizabeth C. Berg;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ELIZABETH BERG's Motion For Order Compelling Compliance With Demand For Physical Examination and Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions.

Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and defense counsel authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. Defense counsel provides the Court an update regarding the parties' meet and confer efforts. The Court instructs counsel to provide the Court with a further update within the next few days.

The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
